message.content:
Read `./.claude/progress.txt`, pick the most important pending task, execute it, update the file, commit, and stop.

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Do NOT change logic, only migrate structure
- The source of truth is card-place, consult it only if in doubt
- The code has already been copied to this repository
- Everything must be migrated to the new architecture/Style Guide (./.claude/STYLE_GUIDE.md)

WORKFLOW:
1. Read progress.txt and identify the next pending task
2. If NO pending tasks exist, output exactly: <promise>FINISHED</promise> and stop
3. If there is a task:
   a. Update task status to "in progress" in progress.txt
   b. Execute migration following STYLE_GUIDE.md
   c. Launch a review agent (Task tool with subagent_type=Explore) to verify the work
   d. Review output and consider improvements
   e. Implement corrections if needed
   f. Update progress.txt marking task as completed
   g. Commit changes
   h. Stop

CRITICAL: If all tasks are completed, you MUST output: <promise>FINISHED</promise>

content.content:
1вҶ’# Reward Program - Redux to Zustand Migration
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’Last Updated: 2026-01-26 21:30
     4вҶ’Status: INCOMPLETE - SCREEN MIGRATION PENDING
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’================================================================================
     7вҶ’CRITICAL: PREVIOUS SESSION ERRORS TO AVOID
     8вҶ’================================================================================
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’1. INFRASTRUCTURE WAS CREATED BUT SCREENS WERE NOT MIGRATED
    11вҶ’   - Zustand stores exist but screens still use Redux connect()
    12вҶ’   - useRescue hook was created but NEVER integrated into screens
    13вҶ’   - This made the migration USELESS - data flows through Redux, not Zustand
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’2. TYPES WERE DUPLICATED UNNECESSARILY
    16вҶ’   - PointsProduct already exists in services/models/products.model.ts
    17вҶ’   - Do NOT add duplicate types - check if they exist first
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’3. BALANCE LOCATION WAS CONFUSED
    20вҶ’   - Balance is in `pointsBalance` within extract.store.ts
    21вҶ’   - NOT in parameter.store.ts
    22вҶ’   - The getPointsBalance() service exists in extract.service.ts
    23вҶ’
    24вҶ’4. PRODUCTION PATTERN WAS NOT FOLLOWED
    25вҶ’   - Production (card-place) calls services DIRECTLY, not always through hooks
    26вҶ’   - Example: getParameterPointsProgram() is called directly in Points screen
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’5. usePermission USES SuperApp's Redux (customerReducer.nrc)
    29вҶ’   - This is NOT local Redux to migrate
    30вҶ’   - Production also uses useSelector for this
    31вҶ’   - Keep as-is until SuperApp migrates customer data to Zustand
    32вҶ’
    33вҶ’================================================================================
    34вҶ’CURRENT STATE (VERIFIED 2026-01-26)
    35вҶ’================================================================================
    36вҶ’
    37вҶ’## Zustand Infrastructure: COMPLETE
    38вҶ’
    39вҶ’| Domain       | Store | API | Model | Repository | Service | Hook   |
    40вҶ’|--------------|-------|-----|-------|------------|---------|--------|
    41вҶ’| airlineMiles | вң…    | вң…  | вң…    | -          | вң…      | вң…     |
    42вҶ’| extract      | вң…    | вң…  | вң…    | вң…         | вң…      | -      |
    43вҶ’| parameter    | вң…    | вң…  | вң…    | вң…         | вң…      | -      |
    44вҶ’| permission   | вң…    | вң…  | вң…    | вң…         | вң…      | вң…     |
    45вҶ’| products     | вң…    | вң…  | вң…    | вң…         | вң…      | -      |
    46вҶ’| rescue       | вң…    | вң…  | вң…    | -          | вң…      | вң… (1) |
    47вҶ’| marketplace  | вң…    | вң…  | вң…    | -          | вң…      | -      |
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’(1) useRescue exists but is NEVER USED by any screen
    50вҶ’
    51вҶ’## Hooks Status:
    52вҶ’- src/services/hooks/useAirlineMiles.ts - вң… Used by AirlineMilesMarketplace
    53вҶ’- src/services/hooks/usePermission.ts - вң… Used by InvoiceCashbackSummary
    54вҶ’- src/services/hooks/useRescue.ts - вқҢ EXISTS BUT UNUSED
    55вҶ’- src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts - вқҢ DOES NOT EXIST (MUST CREATE)
    56вҶ’- src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts - вқҢ DOES NOT EXIST (MUST CREATE)
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’## Screens Status:
    59вҶ’
    60вҶ’| Screen                    | Uses Redux? | Uses Zustand? | Migration Status |
    61вҶ’|---------------------------|-------------|---------------|------------------|
    62вҶ’| AirlineMilesMarketplace   | No          | Yes           | вң… DONE          |
    63вҶ’| ExtractRewardProgram      | No          | Yes           | вң… DONE          |
    64вҶ’| LearnMoreRewardProgram    | No          | Yes           | вң… DONE          |
    65вҶ’| MyOrdersRewardProgram     | No          | Yes           | вң… DONE          |
    66вҶ’| Points                    | YES         | Partial (2)   | вқҢ PENDING       |
    67вҶ’| PointsDetail              | YES (3)     | No            | вқҢ PENDING       |
    68вҶ’| RewardProgramMarketplace  | YES         | No            | вқҢ PENDING       |
    69вҶ’| InvoiceCashbackOnboarding | YES         | No            | вқҢ PENDING       |
    70вҶ’| InvoiceCashbackPoints     | YES         | No            | вқҢ PENDING       |
    71вҶ’| InvoiceCashbackSummary    | YES         | Partial (4)   | вқҢ PENDING       |
    72вҶ’
    73вҶ’(2) Points calls getParameterPointsProgram() directly (Zustand service)
    74вҶ’(3) PointsDetail has connect() but NEVER uses the state - dead code
    75вҶ’(4) InvoiceCashbackSummary uses usePermission (Zustand) but rescueActions (Redux)
    76вҶ’
    77вҶ’## Redux Files That MUST BE DELETED (after screen migration):
    78вҶ’
    79вҶ’- src/redux/ducks/points.ts
    80вҶ’- src/redux/ducks/rescue.ts
    81вҶ’- src/redux/ducks/getMarketplace.ts
    82вҶ’- src/redux/reducers/Models/index.ts
    83вҶ’- src/redux/reducers/index.ts
    84вҶ’- src/redux/sagas/points/models/index.ts (only contains ParametrizationData type)
    85вҶ’
    86вҶ’## Missing Types in Zustand Models:
    87вҶ’
    88вҶ’- FilterOption - exists in redux/ducks/points.ts:63-66, NOT in services/models
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’================================================================================
    91вҶ’STATE MAPPING: Redux вҶ’ Zustand
    92вҶ’================================================================================
    93вҶ’
    94вҶ’## pointsReducer (Redux) вҶ’ Multiple Zustand stores
    95вҶ’
    96вҶ’| Redux Field                    | Zustand Location                              | Service Function           |
    97вҶ’|--------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|----------------------------|
    98вҶ’| points                         | pointsBalance.points (extract store)          | getPointsBalance()         |
    99вҶ’| isLoadingBalance               | pointsBalance.status === LOADING              | -                          |
   100вҶ’| isErrorBalance                 | pointsBalance.status === ERROR                | -                          |
   101вҶ’| products                       | pointsProducts.products (products store)      | getPointsProducts()        |
   102вҶ’| isLoadingProducts              | pointsProducts.status === LOADING             | -                          |
   103вҶ’| isErrorProducts                | pointsProducts.status === ERROR               | -                          |
   104вҶ’| pointsQuantity                 | parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity         | getParameterPointsProgram()|
   105вҶ’| conversionFactor               | parameterPointsProgram.conversionFactor       | -                          |
   106вҶ’| isLoadingParameterization      | parameterPointsProgram.status === LOADING     | -                          |
   107вҶ’| isErrorParameterization        | parameterPointsProgram.status === ERROR       | -                          |
   108вҶ’| appliedTransactionsFilters     | pointsExtractFilters.appliedTransactionsFilters | -                        |
   109вҶ’| appliedExpiringFilters         | pointsExtractFilters.appliedExpiringFilters   | -                          |
   110вҶ’
   111вҶ’## rescueReducer (Redux) вҶ’ rescue store (Zustand)
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’| Redux Field | Zustand Location            | Service Function |
   114вҶ’|-------------|-----------------------------|------------------|
   115вҶ’| isLoading   | rescue.status === LOADING   | performRescue()  |
   116вҶ’| isError     | rescue.status === ERROR     | -                |
   117вҶ’| status      | rescue.responseStatus       | -                |
   118вҶ’
   119вҶ’## getMarketplaceReducer (Redux) вҶ’ marketplace store (Zustand)
   120вҶ’
   121вҶ’| Redux Field | Zustand Location              | Service Function  |
   122вҶ’|-------------|-------------------------------|-------------------|
   123вҶ’| isLoading   | marketplace.status === LOADING| getMarketplace()  |
   124вҶ’| isError     | marketplace.status === ERROR  | -                 |
   125вҶ’| data        | marketplace.data              | -                 |
   126вҶ’
   127вҶ’================================================================================
   128вҶ’TASKS TO COMPLETE MIGRATION
   129вҶ’================================================================================
   130вҶ’
   131вҶ’## Phase 1: Add Missing Type [QUICK FIX]
   132вҶ’
   133вҶ’### 1.1 Add FilterOption to products.model.ts
   134вҶ’File: src/services/models/products.model.ts
   135вҶ’
   136вҶ’Add at end of file:
   137вҶ’```typescript
   138вҶ’export interface FilterOption {
   139вҶ’  value: string | number;
   140вҶ’  label: string;
   141вҶ’}
   142вҶ’```
   143вҶ’
   144вҶ’### 1.2 Export FilterOption from models/index.ts
   145вҶ’File: src/services/models/index.ts
   146вҶ’
   147вҶ’Add: export { FilterOption } from './products.model';
   148вҶ’
   149вҶ’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   150вҶ’
   151вҶ’## Phase 2: Create usePoints Hook [CRITICAL]
   152вҶ’
   153вҶ’### 2.1 Create src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts
   154вҶ’
   155вҶ’This hook REPLACES all pointsReducer + PointsActions usage.
   156вҶ’
   157вҶ’```typescript
   158вҶ’import { useCallback } from 'react';
   159вҶ’import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
   160вҶ’import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
   161вҶ’import {
   162вҶ’  getPointsProducts,
   163вҶ’  clearPointsProducts,
   164вҶ’  getPointsBalance,
   165вҶ’  getParameterPointsProgram,
   166вҶ’} from '../services';
   167вҶ’import {
   168вҶ’  PointsProductsStatus,
   169вҶ’  PointsBalanceStatus,
   170вҶ’  ParameterPointsProgramStatus,
   171вҶ’} from '../models';
   172вҶ’
   173вҶ’export function usePoints() {
   174вҶ’  // Products from products store
   175вҶ’  const pointsProducts = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.pointsProducts));
   176вҶ’  const { pointsProductsActions } = useRootStore.getState();
   177вҶ’
   178вҶ’  // Balance from extract store (pointsBalance)
   179вҶ’  const pointsBalance = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.pointsBalance));
   180вҶ’
   181вҶ’  // Parameterization from parameter store
   182вҶ’  const parameterPointsProgram = useRootStore(
   183вҶ’    useShallow((state) => state.parameterPointsProgram)
   184вҶ’  );
   185вҶ’
   186вҶ’  const requestInitialData = useCallback(async () => {
   187вҶ’    await Promise.all([
   188вҶ’      getPointsBalance(),
   189вҶ’      getPointsProducts(),
   190вҶ’      getParameterPointsProgram(),
   191вҶ’    ]);
   192вҶ’  }, []);
   193вҶ’
   194вҶ’  const requestPointsBalance = useCallback(async () => {
   195вҶ’    await getPointsBalance();
   196вҶ’  }, []);
   197вҶ’
   198вҶ’  const requestPointsProducts = useCallback(async () => {
   199вҶ’    await getPointsProducts();
   200вҶ’  }, []);
   201вҶ’
   202вҶ’  const requestParameterization = useCallback(async () => {
   203вҶ’    await getParameterPointsProgram();
   204вҶ’  }, []);
   205вҶ’
   206вҶ’  const clear = useCallback(() => {
   207вҶ’    clearPointsProducts();
   208вҶ’  }, []);
   209вҶ’
   210вҶ’  return {
   211вҶ’    // Balance (from extract store - pointsBalance)
   212вҶ’    points: pointsBalance.points,
   213вҶ’    isLoadingBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.LOADING,
   214вҶ’    isErrorBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.ERROR,
   215вҶ’
   216вҶ’    // Products (from products store)
   217вҶ’    products: pointsProducts.products,
   218вҶ’    isLoadingProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.LOADING,
   219вҶ’    isErrorProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.ERROR,
   220вҶ’
   221вҶ’    // Parameterization (from parameter store)
   222вҶ’    pointsQuantity: parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity,
   223вҶ’    conversionFactor: parameterPointsProgram.conversionFactor,
   224вҶ’    isLoadingParameterization:
   225вҶ’      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING,
   226вҶ’    isErrorParameterization:
   227вҶ’      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR,
   228вҶ’
   229вҶ’    // Actions
   230вҶ’    requestPointsBalance,
   231вҶ’    requestPointsProducts,
   232вҶ’    requestParameterization,
   233вҶ’    requestInitialData,
   234вҶ’    clear,
   235вҶ’  };
   236вҶ’}
   237вҶ’```
   238вҶ’
   239вҶ’### 2.2 Verify ParameterPointsProgramStatus exists
   240вҶ’File: src/services/models/parameter.model.ts
   241вҶ’
   242вҶ’Should have:
   243вҶ’```typescript
   244вҶ’export enum ParameterPointsProgramStatus {
   245вҶ’  IDLE = 'idle',
   246вҶ’  LOADING = 'loading',
   247вҶ’  SUCCESS = 'success',
   248вҶ’  ERROR = 'error',
   249вҶ’}
   250вҶ’```
   251вҶ’
   252вҶ’If missing, add it.
   253вҶ’
   254вҶ’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   255вҶ’
   256вҶ’## Phase 3: Create useMarketplace Hook [CRITICAL]
   257вҶ’
   258вҶ’### 3.1 Create src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts
   259вҶ’
   260вҶ’```typescript
   261вҶ’import { useCallback } from 'react';
   262вҶ’import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
   263вҶ’import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
   264вҶ’import { getMarketplace, clearMarketplace } from '../services';
   265вҶ’import { MarketplaceStatus } from '../models';
   266вҶ’
   267вҶ’export function useMarketplace() {
   268вҶ’  const marketplace = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.marketplace));
   269вҶ’
   270вҶ’  const requestGetMarketplace = useCallback(
   271вҶ’    async (params: Record<string, string>) => {
   272вҶ’      await getMarketplace(params);
   273вҶ’    },
   274вҶ’    []
   275вҶ’  );
   276вҶ’
   277вҶ’  const clear = useCallback(() => {
   278вҶ’    clearMarketplace();
   279вҶ’  }, []);
   280вҶ’
   281вҶ’  return {
   282вҶ’    data: marketplace.data,
   283вҶ’    isLoading: marketplace.status === MarketplaceStatus.LOADING,
   284вҶ’    isError: marketplace.status === MarketplaceStatus.ERROR,
   285вҶ’    requestGetMarketplace,
   286вҶ’    clear,
   287вҶ’  };
   288вҶ’}
   289вҶ’```
   290вҶ’
   291вҶ’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   292вҶ’
   293вҶ’## Phase 4: Update hooks/index.ts Exports
   294вҶ’
   295вҶ’### 4.1 Add new hook exports
   296вҶ’File: src/services/hooks/index.ts
   297вҶ’
   298вҶ’```typescript
   299вҶ’export * from './usePermission';
   300вҶ’export * from './useAirlineMiles';
   301вҶ’export * from './useRescue';
   302вҶ’export * from './usePoints';      // ADD
   303вҶ’export * from './useMarketplace'; // ADD
   304вҶ’```
   305вҶ’
   306вҶ’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   307вҶ’
   308вҶ’## Phase 5: Migrate Screens [CRITICAL - MAIN TASK]
   309вҶ’
   310вҶ’### 5.1 Points Screen
   311вҶ’File: src/screens/Points/index.tsx
   312вҶ’
   313вҶ’REMOVE:
   314вҶ’- import { connect } from 'react-redux';
   315вҶ’- import { Dispatch, bindActionCreators } from 'redux';
   316вҶ’- import { PointsActions } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
   317вҶ’- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
   318вҶ’- mapStateToProps function
   319вҶ’- mapDispatchToProps function
   320вҶ’- connect() wrapper at export
   321вҶ’
   322вҶ’ADD:
   323вҶ’- import { usePoints } from '../../services';
   324вҶ’
   325вҶ’REPLACE component props with hook:
   326вҶ’```typescript
   327вҶ’const Points: FC<PointsProps> = ({ navigation }) => {
   328вҶ’  const {
   329вҶ’    points,
   330вҶ’    products,
   331вҶ’    isLoadingBalance,
   332вҶ’    isErrorBalance,
   333вҶ’    isErrorProducts,
   334вҶ’    requestInitialData,
   335вҶ’    requestPointsBalance,
   336вҶ’    requestPointsProducts,
   337вҶ’    clear,
   338вҶ’  } = usePoints();
   339вҶ’
   340вҶ’  // Replace pointsReducer.X with hook values:
   341вҶ’  // pointsReducer.points вҶ’ points
   342вҶ’  // pointsReducer.products вҶ’ products
   343вҶ’  // pointsReducer.isLoadingBalance вҶ’ isLoadingBalance
   344вҶ’  // pointsReducer.isErrorBalance вҶ’ isErrorBalance
   345вҶ’  // pointsReducer.isErrorProducts вҶ’ isErrorProducts
   346вҶ’
   347вҶ’  // Keep getParameterPointsProgram() call as-is (direct service call)
   348вҶ’
   349вҶ’  // useEffect cleanup: clear() stays the same
   350вҶ’```
   351вҶ’
   352вҶ’Export: `export default Points;` (no connect wrapper)
   353вҶ’
   354вҶ’### 5.2 PointsDetail Screen
   355вҶ’File: src/screens/PointsDetail/index.tsx
   356вҶ’
   357вҶ’This screen has connect() but NEVER uses pointsReducer state.
   358вҶ’Simply REMOVE all Redux code:
   359вҶ’
   360вҶ’REMOVE:
   361вҶ’- import { connect } from 'react-redux';
   362вҶ’- import { Dispatch, bindActionCreators } from 'redux';
   363вҶ’- import { PointsActions } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
   364вҶ’- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
   365вҶ’- mapStateToProps function
   366вҶ’- mapDispatchToProps function
   367вҶ’- connect() wrapper
   368вҶ’- fintechPointsReducer prop (unused)
   369вҶ’
   370вҶ’Export: `export default PointsDetail;`
   371вҶ’
   372вҶ’### 5.3 RewardProgramMarketplace Screen
   373вҶ’File: src/screens/RewardProgramMarketplace/index.tsx
   374вҶ’
   375вҶ’REMOVE:
   376вҶ’- import { connect } from 'react-redux';
   377вҶ’- import { getMarketplaceActions } from '../../redux/ducks/getMarketplace';
   378вҶ’- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
   379вҶ’- mapStateToProps, mapDispatchToProps, connect()
   380вҶ’
   381вҶ’ADD:
   382вҶ’- import { useMarketplace } from '../../services';
   383вҶ’
   384вҶ’REPLACE:
   385вҶ’```typescript
   386вҶ’const RewardProgramMarketplace: FC<Props> = ({ navigation }) => {
   387вҶ’  const {
   388вҶ’    data,
   389вҶ’    isLoading,
   390вҶ’    isError,
   391вҶ’    requestGetMarketplace,
   392вҶ’    clear,
   393вҶ’  } = useMarketplace();
   394вҶ’
   395вҶ’  // Replace getMarketplaceReducer.X with hook values
   396вҶ’  // getMarketplaceReducer.isLoading вҶ’ isLoading
   397вҶ’  // getMarketplaceReducer.isError вҶ’ isError
   398вҶ’  // getMarketplaceReducer.data вҶ’ data
   399вҶ’```
   400вҶ’
   401вҶ’### 5.4 InvoiceCashbackOnboarding Screen
   402вҶ’File: src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/index.tsx
   403вҶ’
   404вҶ’REMOVE:
   405вҶ’- import { connect } from 'react-redux';
   406вҶ’- import { PointsActions } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
   407вҶ’- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';

   409вҶ’
   410вҶ’ADD:
   411вҶ’- import { usePoints } from '../../services';
   412вҶ’
   413вҶ’REPLACE:
   414вҶ’```typescript
   415вҶ’const InvoiceCashbackOnboarding: FC<Props> = ({ route, navigation }) => {
   416вҶ’  const {

   429вҶ’### 5.5 InvoiceCashbackPoints Screen
   430вҶ’File: src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx

   440вҶ’
   441вҶ’REPLACE:

   453вҶ’
   454вҶ’### 5.6 InvoiceCashbackSummary Screen
   455вҶ’File: src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx
   456вҶ’
   457вҶ’REMOVE:
   458вҶ’- import { connect } from 'react-redux';
   459вҶ’- import { PointsActions } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
   460вҶ’- import { rescueActions, RescuePayload } from '../../redux/ducks/rescue';
   461вҶ’- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
   462вҶ’- mapStateToProps, mapDispatchToProps, connect()
   463вҶ’
   464вҶ’ADD:
   465вҶ’- import { usePoints, useRescue } from '../../services';
   466вҶ’- import type { RescuePayload } from '../../services';
   467вҶ’
   468вҶ’REPLACE:
   469вҶ’```typescript
   470вҶ’const InvoiceCashbackSummary: FC<Props> = ({ route }) => {
   471вҶ’  const { conversionFactor } = usePoints();
   472вҶ’  const {
   473вҶ’    isLoading: isRescueLoading,
   474вҶ’    isError: isRescueFailed,
   475вҶ’    status: rescueStatus,
   476вҶ’    rescueRequest,
   477вҶ’    reset: rescueClear,
   478вҶ’  } = useRescue();
   479вҶ’
   480вҶ’  // Note: isRescueConcluded logic needs adjustment:
   481вҶ’  // OLD: !isRescueFailed && !!rescueReducer?.status
   482вҶ’  // NEW: !isRescueFailed && !!rescueStatus
   483вҶ’
   484вҶ’  // Replace rescueRequest({ payload }) with rescueRequest(payload)
   485вҶ’  // The useRescue hook signature is: rescueRequest(payload, callbacks?)
   486вҶ’```
   487вҶ’
   488вҶ’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   489вҶ’
   490вҶ’## Phase 6: Update Dependent Files
   491вҶ’
   492вҶ’### 6.1 Update type imports in hooks
   493вҶ’Files that import from redux/ducks:
   494вҶ’
   495вҶ’- src/hooks/custom/useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints/index.ts
   496вҶ’  Change: import { PointsProduct } from '../../../services/models';
   497вҶ’
   498вҶ’- src/hooks/custom/useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints/data/index.ts
   499вҶ’  Change: import { PointsProduct } from '../../../../services/models';
   500вҶ’
   501вҶ’### 6.2 Update type imports in routes
   502вҶ’File: src/routes/Models/index.ts
   503вҶ’
   504вҶ’REMOVE:
   505вҶ’- import { Dispatch } from 'redux';
   506вҶ’- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
   507вҶ’- import { PointsTransaction } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
   508вҶ’
   509вҶ’ADD:
   510вҶ’- import { PointsTransaction } from '../../services/models';
   511вҶ’
   512вҶ’Update any types that reference AppReducers or Dispatch.
   513вҶ’
   514вҶ’### 6.3 Update type imports in screens
   515вҶ’File: src/screens/Points/Models/index.ts
   516вҶ’
   517вҶ’REMOVE imports from redux/ducks, ADD from services/models.
   518вҶ’
   519вҶ’### 6.4 Update atomic components
   520вҶ’File: src/atomic/organisms/FiltersBottomSheet/index.tsx
   521вҶ’
   522вҶ’If imports FilterOption from redux:
   523вҶ’Change: import { FilterOption } from '../../../services/models';
   524вҶ’
   525вҶ’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   526вҶ’
   527вҶ’## Phase 7: Delete Redux Files [ONLY AFTER SCREENS WORK]
   528вҶ’
   529вҶ’### 7.1 Delete Redux ducks
   530вҶ’- DELETE: src/redux/ducks/points.ts
   531вҶ’- DELETE: src/redux/ducks/rescue.ts
   532вҶ’- DELETE: src/redux/ducks/getMarketplace.ts
   533вҶ’
   534вҶ’### 7.2 Delete Redux reducers
   535вҶ’- DELETE: src/redux/reducers/Models/index.ts
   536вҶ’- DELETE: src/redux/reducers/index.ts
   537вҶ’
   538вҶ’### 7.3 Delete Redux sagas
   539вҶ’- DELETE: src/redux/sagas/points/models/index.ts
   540вҶ’
   541вҶ’### 7.4 Check for empty folders
   542вҶ’- DELETE: src/redux/ folder if completely empty
   543вҶ’
   544вҶ’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   545вҶ’
   546вҶ’## Phase 8: Verification
   547вҶ’
   548вҶ’### 8.1 TypeScript validation
   549вҶ’```bash
   550вҶ’npm run typecheck
   551вҶ’```
   552вҶ’Expected: Zero errors in migrated files
   553вҶ’
   554вҶ’### 8.2 Knip validation
   555вҶ’```bash
   556вҶ’npm run knip
   557вҶ’```
   558вҶ’Expected:
   559вҶ’- No unused exports in services/hooks/
   560вҶ’- No unresolved imports to redux/
   561вҶ’- useRescue should now be USED (not unused)
   562вҶ’
   563вҶ’### 8.3 Grep validation
   564вҶ’```bash
   565вҶ’grep -r "from 'react-redux'" src/screens/
   566вҶ’grep -r "from '../../redux" src/
   567вҶ’grep -r "connect(" src/screens/
   568вҶ’```
   569вҶ’Expected: No matches (except usePermission which uses SuperApp's Redux)
   570вҶ’
   571вҶ’### 8.4 Functional testing
   572вҶ’- [ ] Points screen loads and displays products
   573вҶ’- [ ] Points screen shows balance
   574вҶ’- [ ] PointsDetail screen works (navigation only)
   575вҶ’- [ ] RewardProgramMarketplace loads redirect URL
   576вҶ’- [ ] InvoiceCashbackOnboarding displays conversion info
   577вҶ’- [ ] InvoiceCashbackPoints allows point input
   578вҶ’- [ ] InvoiceCashbackSummary rescue flow completes
   579вҶ’- [ ] Navigation between all screens works
   580вҶ’- [ ] Clear/reset on unmount works properly
   581вҶ’
   582вҶ’================================================================================
   583вҶ’REFERENCE: File Paths
   584вҶ’================================================================================
   585вҶ’
   586вҶ’## Files to CREATE:
   587вҶ’- src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts
   588вҶ’- src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts
   589вҶ’
   590вҶ’## Files to MODIFY:
   591вҶ’- src/services/models/products.model.ts (add FilterOption)
   592вҶ’- src/services/models/index.ts (export FilterOption)
   593вҶ’- src/services/hooks/index.ts (export new hooks)
   594вҶ’- src/screens/Points/index.tsx
   595вҶ’- src/screens/PointsDetail/index.tsx
   596вҶ’- src/screens/RewardProgramMarketplace/index.tsx
   597вҶ’- src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/index.tsx
   598вҶ’- src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx
   599вҶ’- src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx
   600вҶ’- src/hooks/custom/useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints/index.ts
   601вҶ’- src/hooks/custom/useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints/data/index.ts
   602вҶ’- src/routes/Models/index.ts
   603вҶ’- src/screens/Points/Models/index.ts
   604вҶ’- src/atomic/organisms/FiltersBottomSheet/index.tsx (if needed)
   605вҶ’
   606вҶ’## Files to DELETE:
   607вҶ’- src/redux/ducks/points.ts
   608вҶ’- src/redux/ducks/rescue.ts
   609вҶ’- src/redux/ducks/getMarketplace.ts
   610вҶ’- src/redux/reducers/Models/index.ts
   611вҶ’- src/redux/reducers/index.ts
   612вҶ’- src/redux/sagas/points/models/index.ts

   614вҶ’
   615вҶ’================================================================================
   616вҶ’NOTES
   617вҶ’================================================================================

   620вҶ’   - This is NOT local Redux - it's SuperApp's state

content.content:
1вҶ’# Frontend Style Guide вҖ” Sem Parar (Zustand-only + Hook Component Pattern)
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’Welcome to the **Sem Parar Frontend Style Guide**.  
     4вҶ’This version consolidates: **Zustand as the only state manager**, **Hook Component pattern** for Screens and Atomic components, **services architecture (SOLID)**, and an **cache pattern**.
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’> Sit down, have a cup of coffee and read this calmly. вҳ•
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’---
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’## :pushpin: Table of Contents
    11вҶ’- [Introduction](#introduction)
    12вҶ’- [Components & Screens вҖ” Hook Component Pattern](#components--screens--hook-component-pattern)
    13вҶ’- [Atomic Components вҖ” Hook Component Pattern](#atomic-components--hook-component-pattern)
    14вҶ’- [Project Organization](#project-organization)
    15вҶ’- [Services Architecture](#services-architecture)
    16вҶ’- [State Management (Zustand-only)](#state-management-zustand-only)
    17вҶ’- [Routes Naming](#routes-naming)
    18вҶ’- [Folder Naming Rules](#folder-naming-rules)
    19вҶ’- [Code Standards](#code-standards)
    20вҶ’- [Styles Patterns](#styles-patterns)
    21вҶ’- [Cache Pattern](#cache-pattern)
    22вҶ’- [Checklist](#checklist)
    23вҶ’
    24вҶ’---
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’## Introduction
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’The goal of this guide is to ensure **consistency, testability and scalability** across our frontend projects.  
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’Key decisions:
    31вҶ’- **Zustand** is the **exclusive** global/shared state manager.
    32вҶ’- UI follows the **Hook Component** pattern (logic hook + dumb view).
    33вҶ’- Domain logic lives in **`/services`** with **SOLID** layering.
    34вҶ’- Cache is **typed and reusable**.
    35вҶ’
    36вҶ’---
    37вҶ’
    38вҶ’## Components & Screens вҖ” Hook Component Pattern
    39вҶ’
    40вҶ’Each screen is split into a logic hook and a render-only component.
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’```
    43вҶ’screens/Home/
    44вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ index.ts        # logic: export useHomeScreen()
    45вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ view.tsx        # render: export default HomeScreen
    46вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җ Models/
    47вҶ’    в””в”Җв”Җ index.d.ts    # types (Props, State, Handlers, Return)
    48вҶ’```
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’**Models/index.d.ts**
    51вҶ’```ts
    52вҶ’export interface HomeParams {
    53вҶ’  welcome?: string;
    54вҶ’}
    55вҶ’export interface HomeState {
    56вҶ’  greeting: string;
    57вҶ’  isLoading: boolean;
    58вҶ’}
    59вҶ’export interface HomeHandlers {
    60вҶ’  onPressCTA: () => void;
    61вҶ’}
    62вҶ’export type UseHomeReturn = HomeState & HomeHandlers;
    63вҶ’```
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’**index.ts (logic hook)**
    66вҶ’```ts
    67вҶ’import { useCallback, useMemo, useState, useEffect } from "react";
    68вҶ’import type { HomeParams, UseHomeReturn } from "./Models";
    69вҶ’import { useUserStore } from "@/services/user/store"; // Zustand slice example
    70вҶ’
    71вҶ’export function useHomeScreen(params?: HomeParams): UseHomeReturn {
    72вҶ’  const name = useUserStore((s) => s.name);
    73вҶ’  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
    74вҶ’
    75вҶ’  useEffect(() => {
    76вҶ’    const t = setTimeout(() => setIsLoading(false), 300);
    77вҶ’    return () => clearTimeout(t);
    78вҶ’  }, []);
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’  const greeting = useMemo(
    81вҶ’    () => params?.welcome ?? `Hello, ${name || "guest"}!`,
    82вҶ’    [params?.welcome, name]
    83вҶ’  );
    84вҶ’
    85вҶ’  const onPressCTA = useCallback(() => {
    86вҶ’    // Call services, analytics, navigation, etc.
    87вҶ’  }, []);
    88вҶ’
    89вҶ’  return { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA };
    90вҶ’}
    91вҶ’```
    92вҶ’
    93вҶ’**view.tsx (render)**
    94вҶ’```tsx
    95вҶ’import React from "react";
    96вҶ’import { View } from "react-native";
    97вҶ’import { Text, Button } from "@semparar/design-system-app";
    98вҶ’import { useHomeScreen } from "./index";
    99вҶ’import type { HomeParams } from "./Models";
   100вҶ’
   101вҶ’type Props = HomeParams;
   102вҶ’
   103вҶ’export default function HomeScreen(props: Props) {
   104вҶ’  const { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA } = useHomeScreen(props);
   105вҶ’
   106вҶ’  if (isLoading) {
   107вҶ’    return (
   108вҶ’      <View>
   109вҶ’        <Text>Loading...</Text>
   110вҶ’      </View>
   111вҶ’    );
   112вҶ’  }
   113вҶ’
   114вҶ’  return (
   115вҶ’    <View>
   116вҶ’      <Text>{greeting}</Text>
   117вҶ’      <Button onPress={onPressCTA} text="Continue" />
   118вҶ’    </View>
   119вҶ’  );
   120вҶ’}
   121вҶ’```
   122вҶ’
   123вҶ’---
   124вҶ’
   125вҶ’## Atomic Components вҖ” Hook Component Pattern
   126вҶ’
   127вҶ’```
   128вҶ’atomic/atoms/Button/
   129вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ index.ts        # logic: export useButton()
   130вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ view.tsx        # render: export default Button
   131вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җ Models/
   132вҶ’    в””в”Җв”Җ index.d.ts
   133вҶ’```
   134вҶ’
   135вҶ’**Models/index.d.ts**
   136вҶ’```ts
   137вҶ’export interface ButtonProps {
   138вҶ’  text: string;
   139вҶ’  disabled?: boolean;
   140вҶ’  onPress?: () => void;
   141вҶ’}
   142вҶ’export interface ButtonState {
   143вҶ’  pressed: boolean;
   144вҶ’}
   145вҶ’export interface ButtonHandlers {
   146вҶ’  handlePress: () => void;
   147вҶ’}
   148вҶ’export type UseButtonReturn = ButtonState & ButtonHandlers;
   149вҶ’```
   150вҶ’
   151вҶ’**index.ts (logic hook)**
   152вҶ’```ts
   153вҶ’import { useCallback, useState } from "react";
   154вҶ’import type { ButtonProps, UseButtonReturn } from "./Models";
   155вҶ’
   156вҶ’export function useButton(props: ButtonProps): UseButtonReturn {
   157вҶ’  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false);
   158вҶ’
   159вҶ’  const handlePress = useCallback(() => {
   160вҶ’    setPressed(true);
   161вҶ’    props.onPress?.();
   162вҶ’    setTimeout(() => setPressed(false), 150);
   163вҶ’  }, [props.onPress]);
   164вҶ’
   165вҶ’  return { pressed, handlePress };
   166вҶ’}
   167вҶ’```
   168вҶ’
   169вҶ’**view.tsx (render)**
   170вҶ’```tsx
   171вҶ’import React from "react";
   172вҶ’import { Pressable, View } from "react-native";
   173вҶ’import { Text } from "@semparar/design-system-app";
   174вҶ’import { useButton } from "./index";
   175вҶ’import type { ButtonProps } from "./Models";
   176вҶ’
   177вҶ’export default function Button(props: ButtonProps) {
   178вҶ’  const { pressed, handlePress } = useButton(props);
   179вҶ’
   180вҶ’  return (
   181вҶ’    <Pressable disabled={props.disabled} onPress={handlePress}>
   182вҶ’      <View>
   183вҶ’        <Text>{props.text}{pressed ? " вҖў" : ""}</Text>
   184вҶ’      </View>
   185вҶ’    </Pressable>
   186вҶ’  );
   187вҶ’}
   188вҶ’```
   189вҶ’
   190вҶ’---
   191вҶ’
   192вҶ’## Project Organization
   193вҶ’
   194вҶ’```
   195вҶ’src/
   196вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ @types/            # Global TS types
   197вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ assets/            # Images, fonts, icons
   198вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ atomic/            # UI components (Hook Component pattern)
   199вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ atoms/
   200вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ molecules/
   201вҶ’в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ organisms/
   202вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ modules/           # Microfrontends shared and native modules
   203вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ screens/           # Page-level (Hook Component pattern)
   204вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ services/          # Domain logic (SOLID layout)
   205вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ api/           # HTTP layer (Axios/Fetch)
   206вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ class/         # Class with logical requests
   207вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ hooks/         # Specific service hooks
   208вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ repository/    # Data abstraction & mapping
   209вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ services/      # Business orchestration
   210вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ storage/       # Storage orchestration with cache or not
   211вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ store/         # Zustand slices (only)
   212вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ models/        # Domain types & contracts
   213вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ utils/         # Reusable service helps
   214вҶ’в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ index.ts       # Public exports
   215вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ hooks/             # Cross-cutting React hooks
   216вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ routes/            # Navigation config
   217вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ settings/          # Env & global config (axios, etc.)
   218вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җ utils/             # General-purpose helpers
   219вҶ’```
   220вҶ’
   221вҶ’> UI **never** calls API directly. All effects & side effects live in the **logic hooks** (which call `/services`).
   222вҶ’
   223вҶ’---
   224вҶ’
   225вҶ’## Services Architecture
   226вҶ’
   227вҶ’**Flow:** `UI вҶ’ services вҶ’ repository вҶ’ api` and `UI вҶ’ services вҶ’ store (Zustand)`
   228вҶ’
   229вҶ’- **api/**: request clients; no domain logic.  
   230вҶ’- **class/**: class with logical requests.  
   231вҶ’- **hooks/**: specific service hooks.
   232вҶ’- **repository/**: maps transport to domain, aggregates sources.  
   233вҶ’- **services/**: orchestration and business rules.  
   234вҶ’- **storage/**: storage orchestration with cache or not.  
   235вҶ’- **store/**: Zustand slices (single source of app state).  
   236вҶ’- **models/**: types, DTOs, contracts.  
   237вҶ’- **utils/**: reusable service helpers.
   238вҶ’
   239вҶ’Principles:
   240вҶ’- Single responsibility per folder/file.
   241вҶ’- No circular dependencies.
   242вҶ’- Public APIs exported via `services/index.ts` per domain.
   243вҶ’
   244вҶ’---
   245вҶ’
   246вҶ’## State Management (Zustand-only)
   247вҶ’
   248вҶ’- All global/shared state is **Zustand**.  
   249вҶ’- Slices live under `/services/<domain>/store/`.  
   250вҶ’- Use `persist` (with `createJSONStorage`) only when needed.  
   251вҶ’- Keep setters pure; side effects go in hooks or services.
   252вҶ’
   253вҶ’**Slice example**
   254вҶ’```ts
   255вҶ’import type { StateCreator } from "zustand";
   256вҶ’import type { AuthActions, AuthState } from "../models/store";
   257вҶ’
   258вҶ’export type AuthSlice = {
   259вҶ’    auth: AuthState;
   260вҶ’    authActions: AuthActions
   261вҶ’};
   262вҶ’
   263вҶ’const initialAuth = {
   264вҶ’    user: null,
   265вҶ’    loading: false,
   266вҶ’    error: undefined,
   267вҶ’}
   268вҶ’
   269вҶ’export const createAuthSlice: StateCreator<AuthSlice, [], [], AuthSlice> = (set) => ({
   270вҶ’    auth: initialAuth,
   271вҶ’    authActions: {
   272вҶ’        setLoading: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, isLoading: v } })),
   273вҶ’        setUser: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, user: v } })),
   274вҶ’        setError: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, error: v } })),
   275вҶ’        reset: () => set({ auth: initialAuth }),
   276вҶ’    }
   277вҶ’});
   278вҶ’```
   279вҶ’
   280вҶ’**Root Store**
   281вҶ’
   282вҶ’- Applies to ALL Sem Parar frontend apps вҖ” including SuperApp.
   283вҶ’
   284вҶ’```ts
   285вҶ’import { create } from "zustand";
   286вҶ’import { devtools, persist, createJSONStorage } from "zustand/middleware";
   287вҶ’import { immer } from "zustand/middleware/immer";
   288вҶ’
   289вҶ’import { createUserSlice, type UserSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-user/src/newArch/user";
   290вҶ’import { createAuthSlice, type AuthSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-yourmf";
   291вҶ’
   292вҶ’import storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   293вҶ’
   294вҶ’/** Add your slice Type */
   295вҶ’export type RootStore = UserSlice & AuthSlice;
   296вҶ’
   297вҶ’export const useRootStore = create<RootStore>()(
   298вҶ’  devtools(
   299вҶ’    persist(
   300вҶ’      immer((...a) => ({
   301вҶ’        ...createUserSlice(...a),
   302вҶ’        ...createAuthSlice(...a), // Add your slice here
   303вҶ’      })),
   304вҶ’      {
   305вҶ’        name: "root-storage",
   306вҶ’        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),
   307вҶ’        partialize: (s) => ({
   308вҶ’          user: s.user,
   309вҶ’          auth: s.auth, // Add your store data
   310вҶ’        }),
   311вҶ’        merge: (persisted, current) => ({ ...current, ...(persisted as Partial<RootStore>) }),
   312вҶ’      }
   313вҶ’    ),
   314вҶ’    { name: "RootStore" }
   315вҶ’  )
   316вҶ’);
   317вҶ’```
   318вҶ’
   319вҶ’- For Use on Class.
   320вҶ’
   321вҶ’```ts
   322вҶ’class Auth {
   323вҶ’  private readonly setAuth;
   324вҶ’
   325вҶ’  constructor () {
   326вҶ’    this.setUser = useRootStore.getState().authActions.setUser;
   327вҶ’  }
   328вҶ’
   329вҶ’  function doSomething(data) {
   330вҶ’    this.setUser({ ...data });
   331вҶ’  }
   332вҶ’}
   333вҶ’```
   334вҶ’
   335вҶ’- For Use on Component/Screen.
   336вҶ’- UI never imports the store directly вҖ” uses selectors
   337вҶ’
   338вҶ’```ts
   339вҶ’const loading = useRootStore((s) => s.user.isLoading);
   340вҶ’const token = useRootStore((s) => s.auth.token);
   341вҶ’```
   342вҶ’
   343вҶ’---
   344вҶ’
   345вҶ’## Routes Naming
   346вҶ’
   347вҶ’Standardize as **`Acronym + Route`**:  
   348вҶ’- вң… `SPPayment` (Sem Parar Payment)  
   349вҶ’- вң… `FTHPayment` (Fintech Payment)
   350вҶ’
   351вҶ’---
   352вҶ’
   353вҶ’## Folder Naming Rules
   354вҶ’
   355вҶ’| Folder                              | Convention   | Examples                    |
   356вҶ’|-------------------------------------|--------------|-----------------------------|
   357вҶ’| `atomic`, `screens`, `routes`       | `PascalCase` | `HomeScreen`, `CarDetails`  |
   358вҶ’| `assets`, `hooks`, `services`, etc. | `camelCase`  | `useAuth`, `authService`    |
   359вҶ’
   360вҶ’---
   361вҶ’
   362вҶ’## Code Standards
   363вҶ’
   364вҶ’**Language**: English only.  
   365вҶ’**Naming**: `camelCase` (vars/functions), `PascalCase` (components/classes), `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (constants).
   366вҶ’
   367вҶ’**Explanatory variables**  
   368вҶ’```js
   369вҶ’const onlyNumbersRegex = /^\d+$/;
   370вҶ’const getNumberValidation = (message) => (value) => !onlyNumbersRegex.test(value) && message;
   371вҶ’const isNumber = getNumberValidation("error message");
   372вҶ’isNumber(1);
   373вҶ’```
   374вҶ’
   375вҶ’**Semantic constants**  
   376вҶ’```js
   377вҶ’const DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS = 86400000;
   378вҶ’setTimeout(doSomething, DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS);
   379вҶ’```
   380вҶ’
   381вҶ’**Library workarounds with link**  
   382вҶ’```js
   383вҶ’// Refer to issue https://github.com/ngokevin/react-file-reader-input/issues/11#issuecomment-363484861
   384вҶ’// eslint-disable-next-line no-param-reassign
   385вҶ’event.target.value = "";
   386вҶ’```
   387вҶ’
   388вҶ’**JSDoc**  
   389вҶ’```js
   390вҶ’/**
   391вҶ’ * Truncates an event name to the max length.
   392вҶ’ * @param {*} eventName
   393вҶ’ * @param {*} maxLength
   394вҶ’ */
   395вҶ’```
   396вҶ’
   397вҶ’**Hooks: multi-line deps & IIFE**  
   398вҶ’```ts
   399вҶ’useEffect(() => {
   400вҶ’  (async () => {
   401вҶ’    await CustomMath.randomSum();
   402вҶ’    setSum(42);
   403вҶ’  })();
   404вҶ’}, [
   405вҶ’  setSum,
   406вҶ’]);
   407вҶ’```
   408вҶ’
   409вҶ’**Extract conditions**  
   410вҶ’```ts
   411вҶ’const hasSelectedOffer = !!(selectedProduct || selectedLeasingOffer);
   412вҶ’if (!hasSelectedOffer && !individualOffer) return;
   413вҶ’```
   414вҶ’
   415вҶ’**Optional chaining**  
   416вҶ’```ts
   417вҶ’const answers = formikForm?.values?.answers;
   418вҶ’```
   419вҶ’
   420вҶ’**JSX indentation**  
   421вҶ’```tsx
   422вҶ’{
   423вҶ’  !isEnd && (
   424вҶ’    <Button text="CTA" onPress={handleNavigate} />
   425вҶ’  )
   426вҶ’}
   427вҶ’```
   428вҶ’
   429вҶ’**Early returns**  
   430вҶ’```ts
   431вҶ’if (!data) return null;
   432вҶ’return <View />;
   433вҶ’```
   434вҶ’
   435вҶ’**Nullish coalescing**  
   436вҶ’```ts
   437вҶ’return data ?? 0;
   438вҶ’```
   439вҶ’---
   440вҶ’
   441вҶ’## Styles Patterns
   442вҶ’
   443вҶ’- Do **not** use `StyleSheet` or `styled-components`.  
   444вҶ’- Use **@semparar/design-system-app** for components, tokens, and theming.
   445вҶ’
   446вҶ’---
   447вҶ’
   448вҶ’## Cache Pattern
   449вҶ’
   450вҶ’Keep cache typed, serializable, and domain.
   451вҶ’
   452вҶ’```ts
   453вҶ’import storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   454вҶ’
   455вҶ’export interface CachedData<T> {
   456вҶ’  timestamp: number;
   457вҶ’  data: T;
   458вҶ’}
   459вҶ’
   460вҶ’export interface StorageContract<T> {
   461вҶ’  get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null>;
   462вҶ’  save(data: T): Promise<void>;
   463вҶ’  remove(): Promise<void>;
   464вҶ’}
   465вҶ’
   466вҶ’export class GenericStorage<T> implements StorageContract<T> {
   467вҶ’  constructor(private readonly key: string) {}
   468вҶ’
   469вҶ’  async get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null> {
   470вҶ’    const json = await storage.getItem(this.key);
   471вҶ’    if (!json) return null;
   472вҶ’    return JSON.parse(json) as CachedData<T>;
   473вҶ’  }
   474вҶ’
   475вҶ’  async save(data: T): Promise<void> {
   476вҶ’    const payload: CachedData<T> = { timestamp: Date.now(), data };
   477вҶ’    await storage.setItem(this.key, JSON.stringify(payload));
   478вҶ’  }
   479вҶ’
   480вҶ’  async remove(): Promise<void> {
   481вҶ’    await storage.removeItem(this.key);
   482вҶ’  }
   483вҶ’}
   484вҶ’```
   485вҶ’
   486вҶ’**Guidelines**
   487вҶ’- One storage class per module/feature.
   488вҶ’- Types/interfaces live in `Models/` where appropriate.
   489вҶ’- Use `timestamp` for freshness/expiry strategies.
   490вҶ’- Never persist secrets/PII outside secure storage.
   491вҶ’- Keep payloads small and JSON-serializable.
   492вҶ’
   493вҶ’---
   494вҶ’
   495вҶ’## Checklist
   496вҶ’
   497вҶ’- [ ] Screens/Components follow **Hook Component pattern** (`index.ts` hook + `view.tsx` render)
   498вҶ’- [ ] Types live in **Models/**
   499вҶ’- [ ] Only **Zustand** for global/shared state under **/services/<domain>/store/**
   500вҶ’- [ ] UI never calls API directly (go through **/services**)
   501вҶ’- [ ] Code standards and styles patterns applied
   502вҶ’- [ ] Cache implemented via **GenericStorage** (when needed)
   503вҶ’- [ ] Routes and folder naming conventions followed
   504вҶ’
   505вҶ’---
   506вҶ’
   507вҶ’Happy shipping! рҹҡҖ

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

content.text: Now I have a clear understanding of the patterns. Let me create the useMarketplace hook following the existing usePoints pattern.

summary: Migrate Redux to Custom Hooks Architecture
